Name: FACE_EDIT_PARAM_RACE_PRESET
Description: Preset parameters for full facial customization including proportions, skin tone, and feature shaping.

Fields.Name: Age
Fields.Description: Controls perceived age of the character's face.

Fields.Name: Gender
Fields.Description: Adjusts facial characteristics toward masculine or feminine appearance.

Fields.Name: Facial Geometry Exaggeration
Fields.Description: Controls how strongly facial shape is stylized or exaggerated.

Fields.Name: Texture Exaggeration
Fields.Description: Adjusts exaggeration of skin and surface detail contrast.

Fields.Name: Brow/Nose/Chin Ratio
Fields.Description: Adjusts proportional balance between brow, nose, and chin regions.

Fields.Name: Forehead/Nose Ratio
Fields.Description: Controls proportional balance of upper face to midface.

Fields.Name: Face Width/Weight
Fields.Description: Adjusts overall facial fullness and width.

Fields.Name: Face Roundness
Fields.Description: Controls how round or gaunt (hollow) the face appears.

Fields.Name: Vertical Facial Proportion
Fields.Description: Adjusts overall vertical scaling of facial structure.

Fields.Name: Facial Feature Vertical Shift
Fields.Description: Moves facial features upward or downward.

Fields.Name: Horizontal Facial Proportion
Fields.Description: Adjusts width balance of facial structure.

Fields.Name: Skin Flush
Fields.Description: Controls skin tone between flushed (red) and pale.

Fields.Name: Skin Shade
Fields.Description: Adjusts overall skin brightness from dark to light.

Fields.Name: Skin Tint (Orange/Blue)
Fields.Description: Adjusts warm/cool tone balance of skin.

Fields.Name: Skin Tint (Red/Green)
Fields.Description: Fine adjustment of skin color balance.

Fields.Name: Nose Color
Fields.Description: Adjusts nose coloration between pale and red.

Fields.Name: Forehead Width
Fields.Description: Adjusts forehead width from narrow to wide.

Fields.Name: Nasal Root Height
Fields.Description: Adjusts height of the nasal root area between eyes.

Fields.Name: Upper Nose Bridge Depth
Fields.Description: Controls depth of upper nasal bridge.

Fields.Name: Upper Nose Bridge Depth (Alt)
Fields.Description: Secondary control for nasal bridge depth.

Fields.Name: Nasal Bridge Width
Fields.Description: Adjusts width of upper nose bridge.

Fields.Name: Brow Height
Fields.Description: Adjusts vertical position of eyebrow ridge.

Fields.Name: Eye Socket Tone (Bruised/Bright)
Fields.Description: Adjusts discoloration or brightness around eye sockets.

Fields.Name: Eye Socket Shade
Fields.Description: Controls darkness or lightness around eyes.

Fields.Name: Eyelid Tint
Fields.Description: Controls eyelid coloration between pale and red.

Fields.Name: Nose Shape
Fields.Description: Controls flatness or pointedness of nose tip/bridge.

Fields.Name: Nose Contour
Fields.Description: Adjusts concave or convex shaping of nose region.

Fields.Name: Nostril Tilt
Fields.Description: Tilts nose base up or down.

Fields.Name: Cheek Fullness
Fields.Description: Adjusts roundness or gauntness of cheeks.

Fields.Name: Mouth Shape
Fields.Description: Adjusts mouth between relaxed and pursed states.

Fields.Name: Mouth Corner Tilt
Fields.Description: Tilts mouth corners up or down.

Fields.Name: Mouth-Chin Distance
Fields.Description: Controls distance between mouth and chin.

Fields.Name: Lip Color
Fields.Description: Adjusts lip coloration between flushed and pale.

Fields.Name: Lipstick Preset A
Fields.Description: Preset lipstick color variation (dark red to light blue).

Fields.Name: Lipstick Preset B
Fields.Description: Preset lipstick color variation (dark blue to light red).

Fields.Name: Jaw-Neck Slope
Fields.Description: Controls transition angle between jaw and neck.
